design: All-vs-all: 9 copyrighted carriers x 5 primary copyright_bypass targets = 45 pairs. Carriers: 4 originals (canon_classic_instr, canon_rock_instr, empire_state_of_mind_lyrical, payphone_lyrical) + 5 added 2026-05-02 (a_thousand_years, perfect, photograph, shape_of_you, hey_soul_sister). Secondary attribution/ingestion targets (4 extra per carrier) deferred until primary sweep completes.
